architecturalFeatures.en: Southern Fujian temple architecture with upswept swallow-tail ridges, colorful ceramic mosaics, three-bay main hall, and detailed door-god paintings.
architecturalFeatures.zh: 閩南式廟宇建築，燕尾脊翹起、彩瓷剪黏裝飾，正殿三開間格局，門神彩繪精細。

description.en: Resembling a swallow in flight,the ridge rises gracefully above the temple roof.More than decoration,it reflects hopes for peace and prosperity.
description.zh: 向上飛揚的燕尾脊，像展翅的燕子停駐屋頂。不只是裝飾，也寄託著人們對平安與興盛的期盼。

description.en: The rising incense smoke carries people's prayers and devotion.More than a ritual object,the incense burner holds generations of hopes and faith.
description.zh: 裊裊升起的香煙，連結著人們與神明的心意。來到天后宮，香爐不只是器物，更承載著一代代的祈願與信仰。

description.en:
Standing on either side of the temple entrance, the guardians watch over the sacred space.From the intricate armor patterns
to the expressive brushwork,every detail reflects remarkable craftsmanship.
description.zh: 佇立在廟門兩側的門神，以威嚴神情守護著廟宇。從盔甲紋飾到細膩筆觸，每一處都展現傳統工藝的精湛技藝。

zh: 創建年代：明鄭時期（17世紀）

historicalContext.en: Established during the Dutch-Zheng era alongside port settlements. One of Tainan's earliest Mazu temples, witnessing Tainan's role as Taiwan's first major maritime trade hub.
historicalContext.zh: 建於荷鄭時期，與港口聚落同步發展，是台南最早的媽祖廟之一，見證台南作為台灣最早海洋貿易中心的歷史地位。

modernUse.en: Still an active religious center holding regular temple festivals and processions; includes a cultural display area on Mazu worship history.
modernUse.zh: 現仍為活躍的宗教信仰中心，定期舉辦廟會、遶境活動，並設有文物展示區介紹媽祖信仰歷史。

description.en: Front panorama: Stand at the center of the courtyard, use wide angle to capture the symmetry of swallow-tail ridges — note the ceramic mosaic details on the roof.
description.zh: 正門全景：站在廟埕中央，以廣角捕捉燕尾脊對稱之美，注意屋脊上的剪黏裝飾細節。

description.en: Incense burner close-up: Shoot from a low side angle; use rising smoke and the temple backdrop to create depth layers.
description.zh: 香爐特寫：從側面低角度拍攝大香爐，以裊裊香煙與廟宇背景形成景深層次。

description.en: Door-god paintings: Shoot close to the temple doors; focus on armor textures and the meticulous expression of the guardian deities.
description.zh: 門神彩繪：緊貼廟門拍攝左右門神，注意盔甲紋路與面部神情的工筆細節。

whyItMatters.en: The origin of Tainan's maritime faith, dedicated to Mazu as protector of seafarers. A key source of Taiwan's Mazu worship, witnessing centuries of fishermen and merchants praying before setting sail.
whyItMatters.zh: 台南海港信仰的起源地，供奉媽祖庇護出海商旅。此廟是台灣媽祖信仰的重要源頭，見證數百年來漁民與商人出海前的祈安儀式，至今香火不斷。
